vocab.example: I prioritize consuming antioxidant-rich fruits to fortify the immune system against seasonal illnesses.

vocab.meaning: bài tập ít tác động mạnh (như yoga, bơi lội)
vocab.example: To avoid joint strain, I've incorporated low-impact exercise into my daily routine, such as swimming or cycling.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động thể chất cường độ mạnh
vocab.example: The WHO recommends at least 75 minutes of vigorous physical activity per week to maintain optimal cardiovascular health.

vocab.meaning: thói quen ăn uống chánh niệm (tập trung vào việc ăn)
vocab.example: Developing mindful eating habits has helped me recognize satiety signals and prevent overindulgence.
Resistance training is vital not only for muscular strength but also for maintaining healthy bone density.

vocab.meaning: sự cân bằng về tinh thần
vocab.example: Meditation acts as a cornerstone for my mental equilibrium, helping me navigate the stresses of professional life.
I strictly adhere to a digital detox before bed to ensure I get eight hours of restorative sleep.
Building lean muscle through weightlifting is an effective way to naturally boost your resting metabolic rate.

vocab.meaning: lượng thực phẩm chế biến sẵn tiêu thụ
vocab.example: I've made a concerted effort to drastically reduce my processed food intake to lower the risk of chronic inflammation.
A balanced diet combined with consistent cardio sessions has significantly enhanced my overall stamina and vitality.
